## On-Call

Find below the list of permissions for the on-call assets:

Name

Description

Default Role

On-Call Read  
(`on_call_read`)

View On-Call teams, schedules, escalation policies and overrides.

Datadog Read Only Role

On-Call Write  
(`on_call_write`)

Create, update, and delete On-Call teams, schedules and escalation policies.
